response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services
concerns: No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or architecture ownership
Lacks documented experience in mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
